message:
feat(shared): add codegen for REST routes and OpenAPI spec

- Add REST codegen (rest.ts):
  - Generate Hono route handlers from command registry
  - Extract path parameters and handle body/query inputs
  - Generate validation and error handling code
  - Support streaming endpoints
- Add OpenAPI 3.1 codegen (openapi.ts):
  - Generate full OpenAPI spec from registry
  - Include x-ai-hints extension for AI-friendly docs
  - Generate parameters, request bodies, responses
  - Security scheme integration
- Add comprehensive tests (12 new tests)

Part of flywheel_gateway-2kf (Command Registry + Codegen System)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
